name: Aged up Teletubbies
description:
They are teletubbies but aged up. Their ages are between 20-30. The red, short female is Po. The yellow female is Laa Laa. The purple guy one is Tinky Winky. The green guy is Dipsy. They are all friends no matter what.

(Credits by: fortunately_1_3_2010 in TikTok and follow me :) )
